channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lakers rookie Dalton Knecht hits 9 3-pointers in another outstanding perimeter performance
item.description: Dalton Knecht could only shrug when he buried his fourth consecutive 3-pointer and sent the Los Angeles Lakers’ entire arena into a frenzy.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nuggets guard Russell Westbook posts 200th career triple-double in win over Grizzlies
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Denver Nuggets guard Russell Westbrook posted the 200th triple-double of his career on Tuesday night in a win over Memphis. The NBA recordholder for triple-doubles reached the milestone late in a 122-110 victory.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kam Jones gets triple-double as No. 15 Marquette trounces No. 6 Purdue 76-58
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Kam Jones had 17 points, 13 rebounds and 10 assists as No. 15 Marquette defeated No. 6 Purdue 76-58 on Tuesday night to snap the Boilermakers’ 39-game regular-season nonconference winning streak.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Celtics hand Cavaliers first loss of season, winning 120-117 to end Cleveland's 15-game win streak
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The defending NBA champions held off the league’s hottest team on Tuesday night, with Jayson Tatum scoring 33 points and adding 12 rebounds to lead the Boston Celtics to a 120-117 victory over Cleveland and hand the Cavaliers their first loss after 15 straight wins to open the season.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Livvy Dunne explains awkward moment with Paul Skenes after he won NL Rookie of the Year
item.description: LSU gymnast Livvy Dunne explained the awkward exchange between her and her boyfriend, Pittsburgh Pirates ace Paul Skenes, after he was named National League Rookie of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Stephen Vogt wins AL Manager of the Year in first season
item.description: Vogt led the Guardians to a 92-69 record and the playoffs in his first season after replacing three-time manager of the year Terry Francona.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: After Nick Bosa celebration, ‘Trump dance’ takes sports world by storm
item.description: Days after Trump's reelection, the 49ers defensive end celebrated a sack in the team's win over Tampa Bay.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays say new St. Pete stadium is unlikely to be ready for 2028 season, if at all
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — A combination of severe hurricane damage to Tropicana Field and political delays on financing means it is highly unlikely the Tampa Bay Rays' planned new stadium will be ready for the 2028 season, if at all, the team said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NHL referee Mitch Dunning is home and expects to make a full recovery, league says
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The NHL referee who was stretchered out of a game following a violent collision with Colorado defenseman Josh Manson was back home Tuesday and expected to make a full recovery.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: USU seeks to overturn loss in forfeited volleyball game against San Jose State
item.description: Just hours after Utah lawmakers urged Utah State University to join a Title IX lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference, the Logan-based school filed a motion to join the lawsuit, in part.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Pulisic scores twice, US beats Jamaica 4-2 for 5-2 aggregate win in CONCACAF Nations League QF
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Mauricio Pochettino had a message for American players after a 5-2 aggregate win over Jamaica gave the three-time defending champion United States a berth in the CONCACAF Nations League semifinals. “My advice is look after yourself.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An emotional Rafael Nadal retires at the Davis Cup after he loses and Spain is eliminated
item.description: Rafael Nadal has lost 6-4, 6-4 to Botic van de Zandschulp of the Netherlands in the Davis Cup quarterfinals in what will be the last match of the 22-time Grand Slam champion’s career.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US skier Mikaela Shiffrin wins 1st World Cup slalom of season for her 98th career victory
item.description: American ski star Mikaela Shiffrin earned her record-extending 98th career World Cup win Saturday to give herself the chance to compete for victory No. 100 in front of a home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thousands of Netflix users report outages during Tyson-Paul boxing match
item.description: Just as thousands of Netflix users flocked to the app to stream Friday night's head-to-head boxing match between champion Mike Tyson and YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul, the stream crashed.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, WGN 9

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays will play their 2025 home games at the New York Yankees' nearby spring training ballpark amid uncertainty about the future of hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field, Rays executives told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is coming out of retirement to rejoin the U.S. Ski Team, she announced Thursday, intending to race again at age 40 — and six years after her last Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bruce-Mahoney basketball games to be played for the first-time ever at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- One of the oldest high school sports rivalries in the country is taking its annual basketball matchup to San Francisco's biggest basketball stage. For the first time, the Bruce-Mahoney basketball game will be played at the Chase Center. The St.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
